kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Connexion avec un utilisateur verrouillé

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given User Is On The Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When User Logs In With Locked Account
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then An Error Message Is Displayed For Locked User
Get Error Message Text
Get Text
kw.msg: ${text} = Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.msg: ${msg} = Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

Select From List By Value

kw.name: Then Products Are Sorted By Price Ascending
Get All Product Prices As Numbers
Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Converts the given item to a floating point number.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

Location Should Contain
kw.msg: Location should have contained 'inventory' but it was 'https://www.saucedemo.com/'.

kw.status: Location should have contained 'inventory' but it was 'https://www.saucedemo.com/'.
Location should have contained 'inventory' but it was 'https://www.saucedemo.com/'.

kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
